name: Palmetto Propane, Fuels, & Ice
notes: Actually has website at palmettopropane.com. Multi-location operator serving GA and SC; Augusta GA is one of several locations. Original record listed as no-website single-loc GA operator is incorrect.

name: Affordable Propane Arkansas
notes: Single-location small operator. Active Facebook page (AffordablePropaneAR), no standalone website confirmed.

name: Mountain Country Propane
notes: Could not find Arkansas-based Mountain Country Propane. The known 'Mountain Country Propane' operates in southern Missouri (Sparta, Mountain Grove, Lebanon, Laurie, MO) at mtncountrypropane.com - not Arkansas. Original state hint may be incorrect; likely MO operator or defunct AR entity.

name: Tumbleweed Propane, Inc.
notes: Single-location small operator, only locally owned in Hot Springs County WY. Serves Hot Springs, Fremont, Big Horn and Washakie Counties. Has website at tumbleweedpropane.com - original record as no-website may be incorrect.

name: Red Flame Oil & Propane
notes: Single-location small operator. Located in VA (not WV as original hint suggested), though serves areas near WV border. Has website at redflame.co - original record incorrect on state and website status.

name: West Plains Propane
notes: Located in Missouri, not Arkansas. 2 locations. Has website at westplainspropane.com - original record incorrect on state and website status.

name: South Fork Propane
notes: Single-location small operator in South Fork, CO. Has website at southforkpropane.com - original record incorrect on website status.

name: Duncan Service Inc
notes: Located in Pennsylvania, not West Virginia. Single location. Has website at duncanserviceincpa.com - original record incorrect on state and website status.

name: Northwest Propane
notes: Multi-location operator (3 branches) serving Whatcom, Skagit, Snohomish, and Island Counties since 1947. Has website at nwpropane.net - original record incorrect on both nlocs (3 not 1) and website status.

name: SWVA Gas Service
notes: Single-location SW Virginia operator. Now reportedly operating under name Blumont Energy. Has website at swvagasservice.com - original record incorrect on website status.

name: Queen City Gas
notes: Could not confirm Arkansas-based Queen City Gas. Known 'Queen City Gas' is located in Ozark, MO at 200 East South Street, Ozark, MO 65721, phone (417) 485-4300 - not Arkansas. Original state hint likely incorrect; may be MO operator or defunct AR entity.

name: APE Fuels Inc
notes: Single-location family-owned operator since 2001. Has website at apefuels.com - original record incorrect on website status.

name: L & L Propane
notes: Single-location small operator since 1988. Has website at landlpropane.com - original record incorrect on website status.

name: Brummer Co
notes: Single-location small operator on Madeline Island (La Pointe, WI). Only a PO Box found - no confirmed street address. No website confirmed.

name: Samco
notes: Could not find any propane/butane operator named 'Samco' in Arizona. Named entities found were Samco FM (HVAC) and Samco Enterprises (compressor parts) - neither are propane suppliers. Likely defunct, acquired, or name is incorrect/incomplete.
